records.title: Residential Building Permit Requirements
records.text:
PERMIT_FAMILY: Residential Building Permit
STAGE: Intake > Plan Review > Issuance
DOCUMENT_RULE: Site plan required | stage=Intake | applies_to=new construction
DOCUMENT_RULE: Structural plans required | stage=Plan Review | applies_to=alterations
FEE_TRIGGER: Plan review fee due | stage=Intake | event=application accepted
DEADLINE: Corrections response window | stage=Plan Review | days=180
EXCEPTION: Historic resource review may add routing | stage=Plan Review
